title: Taxonomy of Cryptanalysis Attacks
description: A hierarchical flowchart categorizing the main types of cryptanalytic attacks based on the information available to the attacker and the attack's goal.
relationships: Cryptanalysis (Root Node) splits into attacks based on information available and methodology
Information-Based Attacks branch into Ciphertext-Only, Known-Plaintext, Chosen-Plaintext, and Chosen-Ciphertext
Chosen-Plaintext and Chosen-Ciphertext have Adaptive subtypes
Methodology-Based Attacks branch into Brute-Force, Side-Channel, and Mathematical Analysis
